stu_demo

Group projects, orchestrated.

SyncUp decomposes your project, assigns tasks fairly, schedules meetings, and keeps everyone on track — all on its own.

Demo session
You are signed in as student on project proj_demo. Use the role switcher in the top bar to flip between student and professor views.
